'left' : 'right';\n this.save();\n }\n\n toggleHints() {\n this.profile.showHints = !this.profile.showHints;\n this.save();\n }\n\n get nickname(): string {\n return this.profile.nickname;\n }\n\n readonly AVATAR_COLORS = [\n '#00ffff', '#ff00ff', '#00ff88', '#ff6600',\n '#ffff00', '#ff0066', '#8844ff', '#44ff44',\n ];\n\n cycleColor(): string {\n const idx = this.AVATAR_COLORS.indexOf(this.profile.avatarColor);\n const next = (idx + 1) % this.AVATAR_COLORS.length;\n this.setAvatarColor(this.AVATAR_COLORS[next]);\n return this.profile.avatarColor;\n }\n}\n","path":"neon-darts/src/profile.ts"}","call_id":"toolu_01AWHb7mumnrhQ1Y9NBRJ5qi","name":"write","type":"function_call"},{"call_id":"toolu_01AWHb7mumnrhQ1Y9NBRJ5qi","output":"wrote 2306 bytes to /home/hatch/workspace/neon-darts/src/profile.ts","success":true,"type":"function_call_output"},{"arguments":"{"content":"// Ambient particle system — floating neon particles, grid pulses\nimport {\n World,\n Group,\n Mesh,\n SphereGeometry,\n MeshBasicMaterial,\n Color,\n AdditiveBlending,\n Vector3,\n BufferGeometry,\n Float32BufferAttribute,\n Points,\n PointsMaterial,\n} from '@iwsdk/core';\n\ninterface Particle {\n mesh: Mesh | Points;\n velocity: Vector3;\n life: number;\n maxLife: number;\n baseY: number;\n phase: number;\n}\n\nexport class ParticleSystem {\n private world: World;\n private group: Group;\n private particles: Particle[] = [];\n private dustCloud: Points | null = null;\n private dustPositions: Float32Array | null = null;\n private time = 0;\n\n constructor(world: World) {\n this.world = world;\n this.group = new Group();\n world.scene.add(this.group as any);\n this.createFloatingOrbs();\n this.createDustCloud();\n }\n\n private createFloatingOrbs() {\n const colors = ['#00ffff', '#ff00ff', '#00ff88', '#ff6600', '#8844ff', '#ffff00'];\n const orbGeo = new SphereGeometry(0.015, 6, 6);\n\n for (let i = 0; i < 40; i++) {\n const color = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];\n const mat = new MeshBasicMaterial({\n color: new Color(color),\n transparent: true,\n opacity: 0.4 + Math.random() * 0.3,\n blending: AdditiveBlending,\n });\n const mesh = new Mesh(orbGeo, mat);\n\n const x = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 12;\n const y = 0.3 + Math.random() * 4;\n const z = -6 + Math.random() * 10;\n mesh.position.set(x, y, z);\n this.group.add(mesh);\n\n this.particles.push({\n mesh,\n velocity: new Vector3(\n (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.1,\n (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.05,\n (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.05,\n ),\n life: Math.random() * 10,\n maxLife: 8 + Math.random() * 6,\n baseY: y,\n phase: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,\n });\n }\n }\n\n private createDustCloud() {\n const count = 200;\n const positions = new Float32Array(count * 3);\n const colors = new Float32Array(count * 3);\n const dustColors = [\n new Color('#00ffff'),\n new Color('#ff00ff'),\n new Color('#00ff88'),\n ];\n\n for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n positions[i * 3] = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 16;\n positions[i * 3 + 1] = Math.random() * 5;\n positions[i * 3 + 2] = -8 + Math.random() * 12;\n\n const c = dustColors[Math.floor(Math.random() * dustColors.length)];\n colors[i * 3] = c.r;\n colors[i * 3 + 1] = c.g;\n colors[i * 3 + 2] = c.b;\n }\n\n const geo = new BufferGeometry();\n geo.setAttribute('position', new Float32BufferAttribute(positions, 3));\n geo.setAttribute('color', new Float32BufferAttribute(colors, 3));\n\n const mat = new PointsMaterial({\n size: 0.02,\n vertexColors: true,\n transparent: true,\n opacity: 0.25,\n blending: AdditiveBlending,\n depthWrite: false,\n });\n\n this.dustCloud = new Points(geo, mat);\n this.dustPositions = positions;\n this.group.add(this.dustCloud);\n }\n\n update(dt: number) {\n this.time += dt;\n\n // Animate floating orbs\n for (const p of this.particles) {\n p.life += dt;\n const mesh = p.mesh as Mesh;\n\n // Gentle floating motion\n mesh.position.y = p.baseY + Math.sin(this.time * 0.5 + p.phase) * 0.3;\n mesh.position.x += p.velocity.x * dt;\n mesh.position.z += p.velocity.z * dt;\n\n // Pulse opacity\n const mat = mesh.material as MeshBasicMaterial;\n mat.opacity = (0.3 + Math.sin(this.time * 1.5 + p.phase) * 0.2);\n\n // Wrap around bounds\n if (mesh.position.x > 7) mesh.position.x = -7;\n if (mesh.position.x < -7) mesh.position.x = 7;\n if (mesh.position.z > 4) mesh.position.z = -6;\n if (mesh.position.z < -8) mesh.position.z = 4;\n\n // Scale pulse\n const s = 0.8 + Math.sin(this.time * 2 + p.phase * 2) * 0.3;\n mesh.scale.set(s, s, s);\n }\n\n // Animate dust cloud\n if (this.dustCloud && this.dustPositions) {\n const positions = this.dustPositions;\n for (let i = 0; i < positions.length / 3; i++) {\n positions[i * 3 + 1] += dt * 0.05; // Slow rise\n if (positions[i * 3 + 1] > 5) positions[i * 3 + 1] = 0;\n }\n (this.dustCloud.geometry.attributes.position as any).needsUpdate = true;\n\n // Rotate dust cloud slowly\n this.dustCloud.rotation.y += dt * 0.02;\n }\n }\n\n // Burst effect when something exciting happens\n burst(position: Vector3, color: string, count = 12) {\n const burstGeo = new SphereGeometry(0.01, 4, 4);\n const mat = new MeshBasicMaterial({\n color: new Color(color),\n transparent: true,\n opacity: 0.8,\n blending: AdditiveBlending,\n });\n\n for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n const mesh = new Mesh(burstGeo, mat.clone());\n mesh.position.copy(position);\n this.group.add(mesh);\n\n const dir = new Vector3(\n (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2,\n (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2,\n (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2,\n ).normalize().multiplyScalar(0.5 + Math.random() * 1.5);\n\n const startTime = this.time;\n const burstLife = 0.6 + Math.random() * 0.4;\n\n const animate = () => {\n const elapsed = this.time - startTime;\n if (elapsed > burstLife) {\n this.group.remove(mesh);\n return;\n }\n const t = elapsed / burstLife;\n mesh.position.x += dir.x * 0.016 * (1 - t);\n mesh.position.y += dir.y * 0.016 * (1 - t) - 0.005;\n mesh.position.z += dir.z * 0.016 * (1 - t);\n (mesh.material as MeshBasicMaterial).opacity = 0.8 * (1 - t);\n mesh.scale.setScalar(1 - t * 0.5);\n requestAnimationFrame(animate);\n };\n requestAnimationFrame(animate);\n }\n }\n}\n","path":"neon-darts/src/particles.ts"}","call_id":"toolu_01WvFVYwGzmDhpFbeEKedXpH","name":"write","type":"function_call"},{"call_id":"toolu_01WvFVYwGzmDhpFbeEKedXpH","output":"wrote 5736 bytes to /home/hatch/workspace/neon-darts/src/particles.ts","success":true,"type":"function_call_output"},{"role":"assistant","text":"Now create the new UI templates:","type":"message"},{"arguments":"{"content":"\n\n

private world: World;\n private enabled = true;\n\n constructor(world: World) {\n this.world = world;\n }\n\n setEnabled(enabled: boolean) {\n this.enabled = enabled;\n }\n\n private getXRSession(): XRSession | null {\n try {\n const renderer = (this.world as any).renderer;\n return renderer?.xr?.getSession?.() || null;\n } catch {\n return null;\n }\n }\n\n private vibrate(hand: 'left' | 'right', intensity: number, duration: number) {\n if (!this.enabled) return;\n\n const session = this.getXRSession();\n if (!session) return;\n\n try {\n for (const source of session.inputSources) {\n if (source.handedness === hand && source.gamepad) {\n const actuator = (source.gamepad as any).hapticActuators?.[0];\n if (actuator) {\n actuator.pulse(intensity, duration);\n }\n }\n }\n } catch {\n // Haptic not supported — fail silently\n }\n }\n\n // Throw feedback — medium pulse on throw\n onThrow(power: number) {\n const intensity = 0.3 + power * 0.5;\n this.vibrate('right', intensity, 80);\n }\n\n // Hit feedback — varies by score\n onHit(multiplier: number, segment: number) {\n if (segment === 25) {\n // Bullseye — strong double pulse\n this.vibrate('right', 0.9, 100);\n setTimeout(() => this.vibrate('right', 0.9, 100), 120);\n } else if (multiplier === 3) {\n // Triple — strong pulse\n this.vibrate('right', 0.8, 120);\n } else if (multiplier === 2) {\n // Double — medium pulse\n this.vibrate('right', 0.6, 80);\n } else {\n // Single — light tap\n this.vibrate('right', 0.3, 40);\n }\n }\n\n // Miss — very light pulse\n onMiss() {\n this.vibrate('right', 0.15, 30);\n }\n\n // Achievement unlock — celebration pattern\n onAchievement() {\n this.vibrate('right', 0.5, 60);\n setTimeout(() => this.vibrate('left', 0.5, 60), 80);\n setTimeout(() => this.vibrate('right', 0.7, 80), 200);\n setTimeout(() => this.vibrate('left', 0.7, 80), 280);\n }\n\n // Killer elimination — dramatic feedback\n onElimination() {\n this.vibrate('right', 1.0, 200);\n this.vibrate('left', 1.0, 200);\n }\n\n // Game over\n onGameOver(won: boolean) {\n if (won) {\n // Victory pattern\n for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {\n setTimeout(() => {\n this.vibrate('right', 0.6, 60);\n this.vibrate('left', 0.6, 60);\n }, i * 150);\n }\n } else {\n // Defeat — single low rumble\n this.vibrate('right', 0.3, 300);\n }\n }\n\n // Charging feedback — escalating pulses while charging throw\n onCharging(power: number) {\n // Only pulse at certain thresholds\n const threshold = Math.floor(power * 10);\n if (threshold > 0 && threshold % 2 === 0) {\n this.vibrate('right', 0.1 + power * 0.3, 20);\n }\n }\n\n // Button click feedback\n onClick() {\n this.vibrate('right', 0.2, 15);\n }\n}\n","path":"neon-darts/src/haptics.ts"}","call_id":"toolu_019MhowTnBihtJqt3qEwHP4q","name":"write","type":"function_call"},{"call_id":"toolu_019MhowTnBihtJqt3qEwHP4q","output":"wrote 3006 bytes to routes when score is <= 170\n\ninterface CheckoutRoute {\n darts: string[];\n description: string;\n}\n\nconst CHECKOUT_TABLE: Record = {};\n\n// Build checkout table for scores 2-170\nfunction buildCheckoutTable() {\n const doubles = Array.from({ length: 20 }, (_, i) => ({ seg: i + 1, mult: 2, val: (i + 1) * 2, label: `D${i + 1}` }));\n doubles.push({ seg: 25, mult: 2, val: 50, label: 'D25' });\n\n const singles = Array.from({ length: 20 }, (_, i) => ({ seg: i + 1, mult: 1, val: i + 1, label: `S${i + 1}` }));\n singles.push({ seg: 25, mult: 1, val: 25, label: 'S25' });\n\n const triples = Array.from({ length: 20 }, (_, i) => ({ seg: i + 1, mult: 3, val: (i + 1) * 3, label: `T${i + 1}` }));\n\n const allThrows = [...singles, ...doubles, ...triples];\n\n // 1-dart checkouts (doubles only)\n for (const d of doubles) {\n if (!CHECKOUT_TABLE[d.val]) CHECKOUT_TABLE[d.val] = [];\n CHECKOUT_TABLE[d.val].push({\n darts: [d.label],\n description: d.label,\n });\n }\n\n // 2-dart checkouts\n for (const t1 of allThrows) {\n for (const d of doubles) {\n const total = t1.val + d.val;\n if (total >= 2 && total <= 170) {\n if (!CHECKOUT_TABLE[total]) CHECKOUT_TABLE[total] = [];\n if (CHECKOUT_TABLE[total].length < 3) {\n CHECKOUT_TABLE[total].push({\n darts: [t1.label, d.label],\n description: `${t1.label} → ${d.label}`,\n });\n }\n }\n }\n }\n\n // 3-dart checkouts (only fill gaps)\n for (const t1 of allThrows) {\n for (const t2 of allThrows) {\n for (const d of doubles) {\n const total = t1.val + t2.val + d.val;\n if (total >= 2 && total <= 170) {\n if (!CHECKOUT_TABLE[total]) CHECKOUT_TABLE[total] = [];\n if (CHECKOUT_TABLE[total].length < 2) {\n CHECKOUT_TABLE[total].push({\n darts: [t1.label, t2.label, d.label],\n description: `${t1.label} → ${t2.label} → ${d.label}`,\n });\n }\n }\n }\n }\n }\n}\n\nbuildCheckoutTable();\n\nexport function getCheckoutRoutes(remaining: number, dartsLeft: number): CheckoutRoute[] {\n if (remaining < 2 || remaining > 170) return [];\n\n const routes = CHECKOUT_TABLE[remaining] || [];\n return routes.filter(r => r.darts.length <= dartsLeft).slice(0, 3);\n}\n\nexport function getCheckoutHint(remaining: number, dartsLeft: number): string {\n const routes = getCheckoutRoutes(remaining, dartsLeft);\n if (routes.length === 0) {\n if (remaining <= 170) return 'No checkout with ' + dartsLeft + ' dart' + (dartsLeft > 1 ? 's' : '');\n return '';\n }\n return routes[0].description;\n}\n\nexport function isDoubleOutPossible(remaining: number, dartsLeft: number): boolean {\n return getCheckoutRoutes(remaining, dartsLeft).length > 0;\n}\n","path":"neon-darts/src/double-out.ts"}","call_id":"toolu_01R2g2mWy5dSUzAAXRQnkYqc","name":"write","type":"function_call"},{"call_id":"toolu_01R2g2mWy5dSUzAAXRQnkYqc","output":"wrote 2854 bytes to /home/hatch/workspace/neon-darts/src/double-out.ts","success":true,"type":"function_call_output"},{"role":"assistant","text":"Now let me update the help screen with a comprehensive controls reference:","type":"message"},{"arguments":"{"path":"neon-darts/ui/help.uikitml"}","call_id":"toolu_01Ef5b4ZZptV9XLsNyCh2zU6","name":"read","type":"function_call"},{"call_id":"toolu_01Ef5b4ZZptV9XLsNyCh2zU6","output":"

\n HOW TO PLAY\n 🖱 Browser Controls\n Left Click + Hold — Charge throw power\n Release — Throw dart at aim point\n Mouse Move — Aim at dartboard\n ESC — Pause / Resume\n 🎮 VR Controls\n Right Trigger Hold — Charge throw\n Release Trigger — Throw dart\n Point Controller — Aim at board\n B Button — Pause / Resume\n Haptic feedback on hits (toggle in Profile)\n
\n Game Modes\n 501\n Count down from 501. Must finish on a double.\n Cricket\n Close numbers 15-20 + bulls. MeshBasicMaterial,\n Color,\n AdditiveBlending,\n Vector3,\n} from '@iwsdk/core';\n\ninterface StreakRing {\n mesh: Mesh;\n startTime: number;\n duration: number;\n maxScale: number;\n}\n\nexport class StreakEffects {\n private world: World;\n private group: Group;\n private rings: StreakRing[] = [];\n private time = 0;\n private boardPosition: Vector3;\n\n constructor(world: World, boardPosition: Vector3) {\n this.world = world;\n this.boardPosition = boardPosition;\n this.group = new Group();\n this.group.position.copy(boardPosition);\n this.group.position.z += 0.03;\n world.scene.add(this.group as any);\n }\n\n // Trigger a streak ring effect\n triggerStreak(streakCount: number) {\n const colors = ['#00ffff', '#00ff88', '#ffff00', '#ff8800', '#ff00ff', '#ff0000'];\n const colorIdx = Math.min(streakCount - 1, colors.length - 1);\n const color = colors[colorIdx];\n\n const ringGeo = new RingGeometry(0.01, 0.02, 32);\n const ringMat = new MeshBasicMaterial({\n color: new Color(color),\n transparent: true,\n opacity: 0.8,\n blending: AdditiveBlending,\n side: 2, // DoubleSide\n });\n\n const ring = new Mesh(ringGeo, ringMat);\n this.group.add(ring);\n\n const maxScale = 0.3 + streakCount * 0.15;\n this.rings.push({\n mesh: ring,\n startTime: this.time,\n duration: 0.8 + streakCount * 0.1,\n maxScale,\n });\n\n // Extra rings for big streaks\n if (streakCount >= 3) {\n const ring2Geo = new RingGeometry(0.005, 0.015, 32);\n const ring2Mat = new MeshBasicMaterial({\n color: new Color(color),\n transparent: true,\n opacity: 0.5,\n blending: AdditiveBlending,\n side: 2,\n });\n const ring2 = new Mesh(ring2Geo, ring2Mat);\n this.group.add(ring2);\n this.rings.push({\n mesh: ring2,\n startTime: this.time + 0.15,\n duration: 0.6,\n maxScale: maxScale * 0.7,\n });\n }\n }\n\n // Triple/bullseye highlight — bright flash ring\n triggerHighlight(x: number, y: number, color: string) {\n const ringGeo = new RingGeometry(0.005, 0.012, 24);\n const ringMat = new MeshBasicMaterial({\n color: new Color(color),\n transparent: true,\n opacity: 0.9,\n blending: AdditiveBlending,\n side: 2,\n });\n\n const ring = new Mesh(ringGeo, ringMat);\n ring.position.set(x, y, 0.01);\n this.group.add(ring);\n\n this.rings.push({\n mesh: ring,\n startTime: this.time,\n duration: 0.5,\n maxScale: 0.15,\n });\n }\n\n update(dt: number) {\n this.time += dt;\n\n for (let i = this.rings.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n const ring = this.rings[i];\n const elapsed = this.time - ring.startTime;\n\n if (elapsed < 0) continue; // Not started yet\n\n if (elapsed > ring.duration) {\n this.group.remove(ring.mesh);\n ring.mesh.geometry.dispose();\n (ring.mesh.material as MeshBasicMaterial).dispose();\n this.rings.splice(i, 1);\n continue;\n }\n\n const t = elapsed / ring.duration;\n const scale = t * ring.maxScale;\n ring.mesh.scale.set(scale, scale, 1);\n (ring.mesh.material as MeshBasicMaterial).opacity = 0.8 * (1 - t);\n }\n }\n}\n","path":"neon-darts/src/streak-effects.ts"}","call_id":"toolu_018yWwatH2Mfn5R1pB7STfJZ","name":"write","type":"function_call"},{"call_id":"toolu_018yWwatH2Mfn5R1pB7STfJZ","output":"wrote 3309 {"content":"
### Neon Darts VR — Round 4 (3:00 AM Sentinel)
**Date:** 2026-05-24 | **Time:** ~10:00–11:00 UTC (60 min)
**Files:** 26 src + 25 uikitml = 51 total | **Lines:** 7,416
**Commits:** 3 (e4a012d, 70785e4) | **Deploys:** 2

**Key Work — Bug Fixes:**
- Fixed all TypeScript type errors in src/ (0 remaining):
  - `environment.ts`: Added `as any` casts for Light types passed to `world.scene.add()`
  - `ui.ts`: Added non-null assertions (`!`) for all `entity.object3D` accesses
  - `ui.ts`: Fixed settings volume controls to use new `setSfxVolume`/`setMusicVolume`/`setMasterVolume` methods
- Removed duplicate `updateGameOverPanel()` method
- HTML DOM audit: CLEAN — only `document.getElementById('app')` (IWSDK container) and `document.createElement('canvas')` for texture generation

**New Systems (7 new source files):**
- **Killer game mode** (`killer.ts`): Classic pub game — players get assigned doubles, gain lives by hitting own double, become "killers" who eliminate opponents. AI targeting, last-player-standing win condition, comprehensive status display.
- **Match history** (`match-history.ts`): Persistent game log tracking last 50 matches. Per-game stats (mode, result, avg score, high throw, duration, opponent). Aggregate stats (win rate, favorite mode, total darts).
- **Player profile** (`profile.ts`): Persistent nickname, avatar color (8 options), preferred hand, sound/music volume, haptic toggle. Settings auto-applied on startup.
- **Ambient particles** (`particles.ts`): 40 floating neon orbs with gentle floating motion + opacity pulse. 200-particle dust cloud with slow rise + rotation. Burst effect for celebrations (configurable count/color/position).
- **VR haptic feedback** (`haptics.ts`): Context-sensitive XR gamepad haptic patterns — throw (power-scaled), hit (multiplier-scaled, double pulse for bullseye), miss (light tap), charging (escalating pulses), combo, game over (win pattern vs loss), elimination (dramatic).
- **Streak visual effects** (`streak-effects.ts`): Expanding neon ring effects on the dartboard for combo streaks and high-value hits. Ring count and max scale grow with streak length. Highlight rings at hit positions for triples/bullseyes.
- **Double-out calculator** (`double-out.ts`): Comprehensive checkout table for all scores 2-170. 1/2/3-dart routes with descriptions. Preferred route selection.

**New PanelUI Templates (3 new, 25 total):**
- `killer.uikitml`: Killer mode status panel — player names, target numbers, lives display (hearts), action log
- `history.uikitml`: Match history panel — aggregate stats (played/wins/win rate/favorite), scrollable game log (8 entries)
- `profile.uikitml`: Profile editor — nickname, avatar color, hand preference, SFX/music volume bars with +/- buttons, haptic toggle

**Enhanced Existing Panels:**
- `gameover.uikitml`: Added per-game stats (darts, avg, high throw), victory subtitle, highlighted rematch button
- `modeselect.uikitml`: Reorganized into 2×2 grid layout, added Killer mode button (red styling)
- `title.uikitml`: Added Profile and History buttons, player name display, version number
- `help.uikitml`: Complete rewrite — all 8 modes documented, browser+VR controls, full feature reference

**Audio Enhancements (6 new SFX):**
- Kill hit (descending sawtooth), elimination (dramatic chord), life gain (ascending chime)
- Rematch (ascending triplet), proper volume control methods on AudioManager

**Achievements (36 total, +5 new):**
- Killer Instinct (win Killer), Untouchable (win Killer without losing a life)
- Identity Crisis (customize profile), Rematch King (5 quick rematches), Historian (10 tracked matches)

**Integration:**
- Particle bursts on triple/bullseye hits, victory celebration burst
- Haptic feedback on all throw/hit/miss events, escalating charge feedback, elimination vibration
- Streak ring effects triggered by combo system
- Game over records match history automatically
- Profile nickname used throughout (player name, title screen, game modes)
- Quick rematch preserves settings and resets game stats

**Running totals:** 51 files, 7,416 lines, 25 uikitml, 225 build minutes

# Latest Build Summary — Neon Darts VR

**Date:** 2026-05-24  
**Repo:** https://github.com/ellyz2426/neon-darts  
**Live:** https://ellyz2426.github.io/neon-darts/  
**Status:** In Progress — 165 of 360 target minutes (3 rounds)  
**Source:** 41 files, 5,618 lines  
**UI:** 22 `.uikitml` PanelUI templates, zero HTML DOM  

## Current Feature Set

### Game Modes (7)
- **501** — Count down from 501, double-out finish, bust rule
- **Cricket** — Close 15–20 and bulls, score on open numbers
- **Around the Clock** — Hit 1 through 20 in order
- **Shanghai** — Score on round number, instant win on S+D+T
- **Free Practice** — Solo throwing with running averages
- **Tournament** — 8-round single elimination bracket, escalating difficulty
- **Daily Challenge** — Seeded daily challenges with 7 templates

### Core Gameplay
- Accurate dartboard geometry (20 segments, singles/doubles/triples, bull)
- Charge-and-release throw with power mapping and natural scatter
- AI opponent (3 difficulty levels, 8 named tournament opponents)
- VS Friend local 2-player mode
- Floating score popups at hit location
- Aim cursor/crosshair on board
- Combo/streak system

### Customization
- 10 dart skins (Neon Classic, Inferno, Frost Bite, Golden Arrow, Phantom, Toxic Surge, Crimson Edge, Starlight, Obsidian, Aurora Borealis)
- 5 board themes (Neon Holodeck, Cyberpunk, Arctic Frost, Solar Flare, Matrix)

### Input
- VR controller: trigger charge/release, ray aim, B pause, A confirm
- Browser: mouse aim, click-hold throw, ESC pause

### Audio
- 12+ procedural Web Audio SFX (throw, hit, chimes, miss, game events)
- Ambient drone with LFO modulation

### Spatial UI (22 PanelUI templates)
- Head-following: HUD, power bar, throw history, checkout calc, announcements, message toast, tournament HUD, daily challenge HUD
- World-space: title, mode select, difficulty, pause, game over, leaderboard, achievements (31), settings, help, stats, cricket scoreboard, tournament bracket/result, daily challenge

### Progression
- 31 achievements with toast notifications
- Comprehensive statistics tracking
- Leaderboard (top 50, localStorage)
- Tournament bracket progression
- Daily challenge completion history

### Environment
- Holodeck neon aesthetic with grid floor/ceiling, fog, floating wireframes
- Board spotlights (cyan/magenta/green)
- Hit particle effects

## Build Rounds

| Round | Time | Files | Lines | Key Additions |

| 3 | 65 min | 41 | 5,618 | Tournament, daily challenge, 5 board themes, score popups, aim cursor, 10 skins, 31 achievements, 22 uikitml |

{"content":"# Latest Build Summary — Neon Darts VR

**Date:** 2026-05-24  
**Repo:** https://github.com/ellyz2426/neon-darts  
**Live:** https://ellyz2426.github.io/neon-darts/  
**Status:** In Progress — 225 of 360 target minutes (4 rounds)  
**Source:** 51 files, 7,416 lines  
**UI:** 25 `.uikitml` PanelUI templates, zero HTML DOM  

## Current Feature Set

### Game Modes (8)
- **501** — Count down from 501, double-out finish, bust rule
- **Cricket** — Close 15–20 and bulls, score on open numbers
- **Around the Clock** — Hit 1 through 20 in order
- **Shanghai** — Score on round number, instant win on S+D+T
- **Killer** — Gain lives with doubles, eliminate opponents
- **Free Practice** — Solo throwing with running averages
- **Tournament** — 8-round single elimination bracket, escalating difficulty
- **Daily Challenge** — Seeded daily challenges with 7 templates

### Core Gameplay
- Accurate dartboard geometry (20 segments, singles/doubles/triples, bull)
- Charge-and-release throw with power mapping and natural scatter
- AI opponent (3 difficulty levels, 8 named tournament opponents)
- VS Friend local 2-player mode
- Floating score popups at hit location
- Aim cursor/crosshair on board
- Combo/streak system with visual ring effects
- Double-out checkout calculator (routes for scores 2–170)

### Customization & Persistence
- 10 dart skins (Neon Classic, Inferno, Frost Bite, Golden Arrow, Phantom, Toxic Surge, Crimson Edge, Starlight, Obsidian, Aurora Borealis)
- 5 board themes (Neon Holodeck, Cyberpunk, Arctic Frost, Solar Flare, Matrix)
- Player profile: nickname, avatar color, hand preference, volume, haptic settings
- Match history: last 50 games with per-game stats, win rate, favorite mode

### Input
- VR controller: trigger charge/release, ray aim, B pause, A confirm, haptic feedback
- Browser: mouse aim, click-hold throw, ESC pause

### VR Haptics
- Throw release pulse, hit/miss feedback, combo escalation
- Charging vibration, game over rumble, elimination patterns
- Calibrated per-event intensity and duration

### Audio
- 18+ procedural Web Audio SFX (throw, hit, chimes, miss, kill, elimination, life gain, rematch, game events)
- Ambient drone with LFO modulation
- Per-channel volume controls (SFX, music, master)

### Spatial UI (25 PanelUI templates)
- Head-following: HUD, power bar, throw history, checkout calc, announcements, message toast, tournament HUD, daily challenge HUD
- World-space: title, mode select, difficulty, pause, game over, leaderboard, achievements (36), settings, help, stats, cricket scoreboard, tournament bracket/result, daily challenge, killer status, match history, player profile

### Visual Effects
- Hit particle effects with triple/bullseye burst
- Ambient particle system: 40 floating neon orbs, 200-particle dust cloud
- Streak ring effects: expanding neon rings on combos, highlight rings on high-value hits
- Win celebration particle burst

### Progression
- 36 achievements with toast notifications
- Comprehensive statistics tracking
- Match history with win rate and per-game breakdown
- Leaderboard (top 50, localStorage)
- Tournament bracket progression
- Daily challenge completion history

### Environment
- Holodeck neon aesthetic with grid floor/ceiling, fog, floating wireframes
- Board spotlights (cyan/magenta/green)
- Dartboard number labels

## Build Rounds

| Round | Time | Files | Lines | Key Additions |
|-------|------|-------|-------|---------------|
| 1 | 45 min | 24 | 3,023 | Core game, 4 modes, AI, VR controls, 13 uikitml, audio, 20 achievements |
| 2 | 55 min | 36 | 4,321 | Practice, VS Friend, cricket board, throw history, checkout calc, 6 skins, combos |
| 3 | 65 min | 41 | 5,618 | Tournament, daily challenge, 5 board themes, score popups, aim cursor, 10 skins, 31 achievements, 22 uikitml |
| 4 | 60 min | 51 | 7,416 | Killer mode, match history, player profile, ambient particles, VR haptics, streak effects, double-out calc, 36 achievements, 25 uikitml |
","path":"~/workspace/iwsdk-daily-builds/latest-build-summary.md"}

{"content":"<panel width="0.55" height="0.5" color="#0a0a1a" opacity="0.95" borderRadius="0.02" padding="0.015">
  <!-- Training Header -->
  <panel height="0.05" color="#003344" borderRadius="0.01" padding="0.005" marginBottom="0.01">
    <text fontSize="0.022" color="#00ffff" fontWeight="bold" textAlign="center">
      🏋️ TRAINING DRILLS
    </text>
  </panel>

  <!-- Drill List -->
  <panel flex="1" color="#0d0d25" borderRadius="0.01" padding="0.008" overflow="scroll">
    <!-- Drill 1: Double Trouble -->
    <panel height="0.05" flexDirection="row" color="#1a1a3a" borderRadius="0.008" padding="0.005" marginBottom="0.005"
           event:click="startDrill0">
      <panel width="0.04"><text fontSize="0.022">🎯</text></panel>
      <panel flex="1">
        <text fontSize="0.014" color="#ffffff" fontWeight="bold">Double Trouble</text>
        <text fontSize="0.011" color="#aaaacc">Hit 5 different doubles</text>
      </panel>
      <panel width="0.06" color="#004466" borderRadius="0.006" padding="0.003">
        <text fontSize="0.012" color="#00ffaa" textAlign="center">GO →</text>
      </panel>
    </panel>

    <!-- Drill 2: Triple Threat -->

           event:click="startDrill1">

      </panel>
      <panel width="0.06" color="#004466" borderRadius="0.006" padding="0.003">
        <text fontSize="0.012" color="#00ffaa" textAlign="center">GO →</text>
      </panel>
    </panel>

    <!-- Drill 3: Bull Rush -->
    <panel height="0.05" flexDirection="row" color="#1a1a3a" borderRadius="0.008" padding="0.005" marginBottom="0.005"
           event:click="startDrill2">
      <panel width="0.04"><text fontSize="0.022">🐂</text></panel>
      <panel flex="1">
        <text fontSize="0.014" color="#ffffff" fontWeight="bold">Bull Rush</text>

      </panel>
      <panel width="0.06" color="#004466" borderRadius="0.006" padding="0.003">
        <text fontSize="0.012" color="#00ffaa" textAlign="center">GO →</text>
      </panel>
    </panel>

    <!-- Drill 4: Checkout Practice -->
    <panel height="0.05" flexDirection="row" color="#1a1a3a" borderRadius="0.008" padding="0.005" marginBottom="0.005"
           event:click="startDrill3">
      <panel width="0.04"><text fontSize="0.022">🏁</text></panel>
      <panel flex="1">
        <text fontSize="0.014" color="#ffffff" fontWeight="bold">Checkout Practice</text>
        <text fontSize="0.011" color="#aaaacc">Finish from 32 (D16)</text>
      </panel>
      <panel width="0.06" color="#004466" borderRadius="0.006" padding="0.003">
        <text fontSize="0.012" color="#00ffaa" textAlign="center">GO →</text>
      </panel>
    </panel>

    <!-- Drill 5: Around the Board -->
    <panel height="0.05" flexDirection="row" color="#1a1a3a" borderRadius="0.008" padding="0.005" marginBottom="0.005"
           event:click="startDrill4">
      <panel width="0.04"><text fontSize="0.022">🔄</text></panel>

{"content":"# Latest Build Summary — Neon Darts VR

**Date:** 2026-05-24  
**Repo:** https://github.com/ellyz2426/neon-darts  
**Live:** https://ellyz2426.github.io/neon-darts/  
**Status:** In Progress — 285 of 360 target minutes (4 rounds)  
**Source:** 75 files (42 src + 33 uikitml), 10,414 lines  
**UI:** 33 `.uikitml` PanelUI templates, zero HTML DOM  
**Type errors:** Zero in src/  

## Current Feature Set

### Game Modes (8)
- **501** — Count down from 501, double-out finish, bust rule
- **Cricket** — Close 15–20 and bulls, score on open numbers
- **Around the Clock** — Hit 1 through 20 in order
- **Shanghai** — Score on round number, instant win on S+D+T
- **Killer** — Gain lives with doubles, eliminate opponents
- **Free Practice** — Solo throwing with running averages
- **Tournament** — 8-round single elimination bracket, escalating difficulty
- **Daily Challenge** — Seeded daily challenges with 7 templates

### Core Gameplay
- Accurate dartboard geometry (20 segments, singles/doubles/triples, bull)
- Charge-and-release throw with power mapping and natural scatter
- AI opponent (3 difficulty levels, 8 named tournament opponents)
- VS Friend local 2-player mode
- Floating score popups at hit location
- Aim cursor/crosshair on board
- Combo/streak system with visual ring effects
- 501 checkout calculator (routes for scores 2–170)
- Power-up system: 6 types earned through combos

### Training & Onboarding
- 6-step tutorial for new players
- 7 training drills: doubles, triples, bullseyes, checkout, sectors, consistency, speed round
- Warm-up throws: 3 practice throws before each game
- Throw replay: slow-mo instant replay of last throw

### Customization & Persistence
- 15 dart skins (10 base + 5 premium with rarity: common/rare/epic/legendary)
- 5 board themes (Neon Holodeck, Cyberpunk, Arctic Frost, Solar Flare, Matrix)
- Player profile: nickname, avatar color, hand preference, volume, haptic settings
- Match history: last 50 games with per-game stats, win rate, favorite mode

### Input
- VR controller: trigger charge/release, ray aim, B pause, A confirm, haptic feedback
- Browser: mouse aim, click-hold throw, ESC pause

### VR Haptics
- Throw release pulse, hit/miss feedback, combo escalation
- Charging vibration, game over rumble, elimination patterns

### Audio & Commentary
- 24+ procedural Web Audio SFX
- Ambient drone with LFO modulation
- Per-channel volume controls (SFX, music, master)
- Dynamic commentator: weighted random commentary for 20 event types
- Sound visualizer: reactive ring effects on dartboard

### Visual Effects
- Dart trail effects (neon vapor trails)
- Board hit flash effects (color-coded by type: bull/triple/double/single)
- Camera shake (7 presets: hit, triple, bullseye, miss, gameWin, elimination, bust)
- Board animator (intro elastic zoom, hit wobble, victory spin, idle breathing)
- Hit particle effects with triple/bullseye burst
- Ambient particle system: 40 floating neon orbs, 200-particle dust cloud
- Streak ring effects: expanding neon rings on combos
- Win celebration particle burst
- Scoring highlights: per-turn grade display (S+/S/A/B/C/D)

### Spatial UI (33 PanelUI templates)
- Head-following: HUD, power bar, throw history, checkout calc, announcements, message toast, tournament HUD, daily challenge HUD, drill HUD, turn summary, notification, power-up, warm-up
- World-space: title, mode select, difficulty, pause, game over, leaderboard (v1+v2), achievements, settings, help, stats, cricket scoreboard, tournament bracket/result, daily challenge, killer status, match history, player profile, training drills, tutorial

### Progression
- 51 achievements across gameplay/skill/dedication/discovery categories
- Comprehensive statistics tracking
- Match history with win rate and per-game breakdown
- Per-mode leaderboards (top 20 per mode) + global leaderboard (top 50)
- Tournament bracket progression
- Daily challenge completion history
- Training drill grades (S/A/B/C/D)

### Environment
- Holodeck neon aesthetic with grid floor/ceiling, fog, floating wireframes
- Board spotlights (cyan/magenta/green)
- Dartboard number labels

## Build Rounds

| Round | Time | Files | Lines | Key Additions |
|-------|------|-------|-------|---------------|
| 1 | 45 min | 24 | 3,023 | Core game, 4 modes, AI, VR controls, 13 uikitml, audio, 20 achievements |
| 2 | 55 min | 36 | 4,321 | Practice, VS Friend, cricket board, throw history, checkout calc, 6 skins, combos |
| 3 | 65 min | 41 | 5,618 | Tournament, daily challenge, 5 board themes, score popups, aim cursor, 10 skins, 31 achievements, 22 uikitml |
| 4 | 120 min | 75 | 10,414 | Killer mode, match history, profiles, particles, haptics, dart trails, board flash, camera shake, warm-up, per-mode leaderboards, throw replay, power-ups, tutorial, training drills, commentator, board animator, notifications, scoring highlights, 15 skins, 51 achievements, 33 uikitml |

# IWSDK Daily Builds Log

Track all daily builds to avoid repeating ideas.

## Completed Builds

## 2026-05-24 — Neon Darts VR

### Round 1 (Midnight Build)
**Date:** 2026-05-24 | **Time:** 07:00–07:45 UTC (45 min)
**Files:** 11 src + 13 uikitml = 24 total | **Lines:** 3,023
**Commits:** 2 | **Deploys:** 1

**Concept:** Holodeck VR precision darts — classic dartboard with 4 real game modes (501, Cricket, Around the Clock, Shanghai), AI opponent, and charge-and-release throw mechanic. First precision/pub-sport genre for the portfolio.

**Key Work:**
- Standard dartboard geometry with accurate scoring zones (20 segments, singles/doubles/triples rings, inner/outer bull)
- Scoring math: angle-based segment detection, distance-based ring detection
- Dart throw mechanic: charge-and-release with power mapping, natural scatter, gravity in flight
- 4 classic dart game modes with full rules (501 double-out bust, Cricket marks/scoring, Around the Clock sequence, Shanghai instant-win)
- AI opponent: 3 difficulty levels, strategic targeting per mode (T20 in 501, highest unclosed in Cricket, etc.)
- **ALL UI via PanelUI** — 13 `.uikitml` templates, zero HTML DOM
  - Title, mode select (4 modes + descriptions), difficulty, HUD (Follower), power bar (Follower), pause, game over, leaderboard, achievements (20 slots), settings (volume), help (controls + rules), stats, message toast (Follower)
- VR controller input: trigger charge/release, ray aim, B pause, A confirm
- Browser: mouse aim via raycaster, click-hold throw, ESC pause
- Procedural Web Audio: 12+ SFX (throw whoosh, board hit, score chimes, miss, game start/end, achievement, button, turn change) + ambient drone (55Hz sine + triangle pad + LFO)
- Particle hit effects (12 particles per hit, color by multiplier, gravity + fade)
- 20 achievements, comprehensive stats, leaderboard

{"content":"

### Round 4 Continuation (3 AM Sentinel)
**Date:** 2026-05-24 | **Time:** ~12:00 UTC (60 min additional)
**Files:** 42 src + 33 uikitml = 75 total | **Lines:** 10,414
**Commits:** 4 (4c, 4d, 4e, 4f) | **Deploys:** 2

**New Source Files (18 new):**
- `dart-trail.ts`: Neon vapor trail system — ribbon geometry trails behind darts in flight. Configurable per-skin trail colors, 20-point ribbon, additive blending, auto-fade on impact.
- `board-hit-effects.ts`: Board flash/glow on dart impacts. Pooled (5 flash objects). Color-coded: bull=red, triple=magenta, double=green, single=cyan. Variable duration and intensity.
- `camera-shake.ts`: Configurable camera shake with 7 presets (hit, triple, bullseye, miss, gameWin, elimination, bust). Perlin-noise-like sin combinations, exponential decay, safety cap on intensity.
- `warmup.ts`: 3 warm-up throws before games start. Skip option. Average score tracking, result summary.
- `mode-leaderboard.ts`: Per-mode leaderboard system — top 20 per mode + global top 50. Score, player name, date, mode. Personal best and rank tracking.
- `throw-replay.ts`: Records dart throw trajectory (up to 120 frames). Slow-mo 0.4x replay with interpolated position callback.
- `power-ups.ts`: 6 power-up types (Steady Hand, Double Score, Triple Threat, Zen Focus, Lucky Bounce, Second Wind). Combo-triggered grants, max 2 active, throw-based and time-based expiry.
- `dart-skins-v2.ts`: 5 premium dart skins with rarity (Void Walker/epic, Solar Wind/rare, Quantum Shift/legendary, Blood Moon/rare, Diamond Dust/legendary). Unlock conditions tied to gameplay.
- `tutorial.ts`: 6-step onboarding (welcome, aim, throw, power, scoring, modes). localStorage persistence, skip option, progress tracking.
- `sound-visualizer.ts`: 5-ring reactive visualization on dartboard. Pulsing to audio events (throw/hit), smooth level interpolation, additive blending.
- `object-pool.ts`: Generic object pool with acquire/release/releaseAll. Factory pattern, configurable max size, oldest-recycle overflow.
- `achievements-v2.ts`: 15 new achievements (51 total) in skill/dedication/discovery categories: Perfect Round, Sniper, Bullseye Streak, Checkout Master, Flawless, Marathon, Thousand Darts, Daily Player, Well Rounded, Collector, Power Player, Replay Fan, Warm Up Pro, Theme Explorer, Night Owl.
- `training-drills.ts`: 7 focused practice drills — Double Trouble (5 doubles), Triple Threat (3×T20), Bull Rush (5 bullseyes), Checkout Practice (D16), Around the Board (1-10), Repeat Performance (5×T19), Speed Round (100+ in 30s). Progress tracking, accuracy calculation, grade system.
- `commentator.ts`: Dynamic weighted commentary for 20 event types. Weighted random selection, repeat avoidance, cooldown on common events.
- `board-animator.ts`: Board idle/impact animations — elastic intro zoom, hit wobble with decaying oscillation, bullseye big wobble, victory spin with deceleration, idle breathing scale pulse.
- `notifications.ts`: Priority-queued notification manager. 7 types (info/success/warning/error/achievement/powerup/commentary). Max 3 visible, auto-dismiss, type-colored.
- `scoring-highlights.ts`: Per-turn scoring summary — grade system (S+ for 180, S/A/B/C/D), throw breakdown text, best throw highlight.

**Removed:** `double-out.ts` (redundant with `checkout.ts`)

**New PanelUI Templates (8 new, 33 total):**
- `warmup.uikitml`: Warm-up overlay — throws remaining, results list, average, progress bar, skip button
- `leaderboard-v2.uikitml`: Enhanced leaderboard with mode tabs (ALL/501/CKT/KLR/TRN), 10-row display, personal best & rank
- `powerup.uikitml`: Power-up status HUD — icon, name, description, remaining bar, active count
- `tutorial.uikitml`: Tutorial step display — title, message, progress bar, step counter, skip button
- `training.uikitml`: Training drill picker — 7 drill cards with icons, descriptions, GO buttons
- `drillhud.uikitml`: Training drill HUD — target label, progress count, accuracy %, time remaining, progress bar
- `turnsummary.uikitml`: Turn scoring summary — throw breakdown, total score, average, grade badge
- `notification.uikitml`: Notification toast — icon, title, message, dismiss button

**Integration into main game loop:**
- Dart trails start on every throw, auto-fade on impact
- Board flash triggered on every dart hit (color varies by type)
- Camera shake on every hit (preset varies by type), on game over
- Sound visualizer pulses on throw and hit events
- Board wobble on hits, big wobble on bullseyes
- Power-ups granted through combo system, modify scatter/score
- Scoring highlights track every throw, show turn summary at end of turn
- Commentator fires on 180s via notification system
- All new systems `.update(dt)` wired into requestAnimationFrame loop
- Zero type errors in src/

**Running totals:** 75 files, 10,414 lines, 33 uikitml, 285 build minutes
","mode":"append","path":"~/workspace/iwsdk-daily-builds/BUILD_LOG.md"}
